published_prior_art.cite: closest: SoferRichardsonColicinoSchwartzTchetgen2016 NCO-as-DiD; MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 double-negative-control bridge equations; neither gives this finite paired-law S_W-indistinguishability certificate
MiaoGengTchetgen2018 and MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 already supply proxy/bridge identification under rank or bridge equations; this is a DiD notation specialization
RambachanRoth2023 covers pretrend sensitivity, not double-proxy residual representability; the stated non-representability follows directly from Conjecture 1's equal S_W pair

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: The drafter handoff omitted the required named literature checklist; the review had to reconstruct coverage from Section 5.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: The mandatory comparator_promise_table is missing from the handoff despite named comparators in the proposal.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 3
novelty_flags.one_line: RambachanRoth2023 is cited only as a broad pretrend-sensitivity comparator for the non-representability claim, without a location-level anchor to a specific result or open gap.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the surviving contribution is a finite residual-separation certificate, not a flagship-grade computable frontier, estimator, or new identification algorithm.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The proof is exactly the displayed substitution m(P)=Delta_1^0(P) and Delta_1(P)=tau(P)+Delta_1^0(P), so it has fewer than 3 substantive steps.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: Once Conjecture 1 supplies two laws with identical S_W and different BR status, no phi(S_W) can classify BR is an immediate functional-unfold argument.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the finite separation kernel with a comparator-anchored iff frontier: name the observable statistic using both W and Z, state a sharp necessary-and-sufficient bridge-identification condition, and anchor it to a specific equation or open limitation in the proximal-DiD or double-negative-control literature.
Add an estimator/inference companion for the identified ATT map: a closed-form plug-in or M-estimator, its target, and a rate or asymptotic-normality conjecture under finite binary proxies.

If keeping the negative result, strengthen it from a two-law certificate to an open-set obstruction against a named published diagnostic workflow, with a location-level quote or equation from the target paper.
Emit the required literature_checklist and comparator_promise_table in the Stage -1 handoff so the published-axis review is enforceable without reconstruction.

recommended_next_step: Pivot or kernel-replace: the current proposal is mathematically coherent enough for a field note but is structurally below the flagship novelty floor.
